title: melia sempervirens
intro: Melia sempervirens, also known as the Neem tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Melia sempervirens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system, among others. The herbal preparations of Melia sempervirens include tea, capsules, and oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
